prompt: A dramatic vertical high-fashion sports campaign photo of a {argument name="football player" default="young Black male forward"} in a white {argument name="team kit" default="Real Madrid home kit"} performing a knee-slide celebration on the grass near the sideline inside a packed football stadium at night. The player is centered in the lower half of the frame, leaning back with chest forward and both arms stretched wide, wearing a white jersey with dark trim and gold accents, matching white shorts with the number 7, long white socks, and light-colored football boots with red detailing. His face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur, while the body remains sharply lit and photorealistic. The stadium is massive and full, with thousands of cheering fans dressed mostly in white, 4 visible large supporter flags waving in the background, stewards in neon yellow jackets along the pitch edge, and bright floodlights flaring in the top left corner. Include pitch-side advertising boards with football branding and a dark blue board showing the word RESPECT, plus a curved stadium ribbon displaying repeated celebratory text. Add a huge elegant white serif headline across the upper center reading {argument name="headline text" default="Hala Madrid."}, and a small white {argument name="brand text" default="Pollo.ai"} logo in the top right corner. Shot from a low wide-angle perspective for a heroic, triumphant feel, with cinematic contrast, crisp jersey texture, realistic grass detail, shallow background softness, luxury editorial sportswear ad aesthetic, ultra-realistic photography.
translatedPrompt: 一张极具戏剧张力的竖版高端运动时尚宣传照，主角是一位 {argument name="football player" default="年轻的黑人男性前锋"}，身穿白色 {argument name="team kit" default="皇家马德里主场球衣"}，正在足球场边线附近的草坪上进行滑跪庆祝。球员位于画面下半部分中央，身体后倾，挺胸张开双臂，身穿带有深色饰边和金色点缀的白色球衣，搭配印有 7 号的白色短裤、长筒白袜以及带有红色细节的浅色足球鞋。他的面部被柔和的矩形模糊处理，而身体部分则保持清晰且具有照片级的真实感。体育场宏大且座无虚席，数千名身穿白色球衣的球迷在欢呼，背景中有 4 面清晰可见的大型应援旗帜，球场边缘站着身穿荧光黄夹克的安保人员，左上角有明亮的泛光灯闪烁。画面中包含带有足球品牌标识的场边广告项目，以及一个显示“RESPECT”字样的深蓝色项目，还有一个显示重复庆祝文字的弧形体育场环形屏。在上方中央添加一行优雅的白色衬线大标题，文字为 {argument name="headline text" default="Hala Madrid."}，右上角放置一个小的白色 {argument name="brand text" default="Pollo.ai"} 标志。采用低角度广角拍摄，营造出英雄般的胜利感，具有电影级的对比度、清晰的球衣纹理、逼真的草地细节、浅景深背景，呈现出奢华的运动服饰广告美学，超写实摄影风格。

breakdown.creativeCore: 奢华足球胜利主题宣传海报：一张电影质感的竖版运动时尚广告，展示了一名足球运动员在座无虚席的体育场内滑跪庆祝的场景，非常适合高端促销图文及社交媒体宣传活动。
breakdown.subject: 服饰
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic, editorial, luxury]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
